{{Shell
|name=Lucifer's Wing
|image=Lucifer's Wing.png
|description=After a dark art ritual, the power of Lucifer, the lord of hell, was infused into Snail Shell. The wearer becomes the Demon Lord's kin.
|affct=FTH
|hard=RUSH
|source=Divine Neutral Chest (0.1%)
|color=orange
|earth=9
|water=10
|fire=14
|wind=9
|form=Angel
|element=Wind
|realm=Yamato
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
